case_title: CHRISTINE A. EAST VS. RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY EAST, CHRISTINE A. AS TO DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE A. EAST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT, REPRESETNED BY ROCHELLE NILSSON, EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT IS PRESENT. RICHARD ARRIGHI OF RICHARD ARRIGH ARCHITECTS, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROCHELLE NILSSON, EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT FILED BY DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EAST, CHRISTINE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAST, CHRISTINE A. AS TO DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RELIABLE ROOFING & RETROFIT
